title: FT to LB Conversion Tool (Aviation)
description: Converts fuel and payload weights from kilograms to pounds and feet to meters with aircraft-ready rounding and validation checks.

title: Line Maintenance Checklist Tracker
description: A daily checklist tracker for line maintenance teams with shift handover notes and completion audit trail.

title: Aircraft Defect Priority Board
description: Sorts aircraft defects by operational risk, turnaround impact, and engineering priority for faster decision making.

title: Maintenance Compliance API
description: Locked project. Compliance reports are fetched from a secure backend endpoint for authorized users.

title: Authorized Fleet Insights
description: Locked project. Loads confidential fleet reliability insights from server only for authorized users.
